business.name: BlueFinn Charters Curaçao
business.location: Jan Thiel Beach, z/n, Willemstad, Curaçao

payment.cash_policy: Cash accepted at office only, minimum 24 hours in advance

cancellation_policy.summary: Full refund if cancelled more than 48 hours before departure. 50% refund if cancelled within 48 hours. No refund within 24 hours of departure.

private_charters.pricing: From $1,500 per day depending on vessel and itinerary. Contact us for a tailored quote.

klein_curacao.notes: Turtles very likely near Klein Curaçao. Cannot pet turtles — protected by law. Dolphins possible while sailing.

faq.what_to_bring: Towel, sunscreen, hat, sunglasses. Seasickness pill if you are prone.
faq.extra_costs: No extra costs. Everything is included. Tips appreciated but not required.
faq.transfers: Available via booking form. Guaranteed with 24 hours advance notice. Within 24 hours on request.
faq.dietary: Vegetarian and other dietary needs accommodated if communicated at least 1 day in advance via the booking form.
faq.alcohol_policy: Premium open bar from lunch. No alcohol served to guests under 18. ID may be requested.
faq.seasickness: Best seat is at the back of the boat, outside, facing the horizon. Drink water. Avoid going to the toilet. Take a pill in advance. Crew will help.
faq.children: All trips suitable for children except the 3-in-1 Snorkeling Trip, which requires good swimming skills in open sea.
faq.dolphins: Dolphins are possible while sailing to Klein Curaçao.
faq.turtles: Turtles are very likely near Klein Curaçao. You cannot pet them — they are protected by law.
faq.toilets: Catamarans have 2 marine toilets. Kailani has 1. No toilets on Klein Curaçao island.
faq.swimming_ability: Being comfortable in water is recommended. Life jackets and noodles are available. Guests can take the dinghy to the beach instead of swimming.
faq.scuba_diving: Kailani is equipped for scuba. You can also join a 1-tank dive on BlueFinn1 for the Klein Curaçao trip. Contact Scuba Do separately: info@divecenterscubado.com
faq.local_student_rate: Available via WhatsApp. Valid local ID or internship agreement required.
faq.private_charters: Yes, private charters are available. Contact info@bluefinncharters.com for availability and pricing.
faq.sustainability: BlueFinn uses reusable cups, solar panels, and a can pressing system.
faq.ride_duration_klein_curacao: Approximately 1 hour 45 minutes by catamaran, approximately 1 hour 15 minutes by Kailani. Depends on weather.
faq.snorkel_gear_included: Snorkel masks and pipe included. Flippers are not included.
faq.no_payment_at_boarding: No payment is accepted at boarding. Payment must be completed in advance.
faq.cash_payment: Cash is accepted at the office only, minimum 24 hours before the trip.
faq.booking_in_advance: Booking fills up 4 to 7 days in advance on average. Book early to secure your spot.
faq.group_bookings: For groups of 15 or more, contact the team directly for tailored arrangements.
faq.special_requests: Special requests and dietary needs should be communicated via the booking form at least 1 day in advance.
faq.what_is_included: All shared trips include the items listed per trip. No hidden costs.
faq.age_child_pricing: Child pricing applies to guests aged 4 to 12. Children under 4 are free.
faq.klein_curacao_what_is_it: Klein Curaçao is a small uninhabited island southeast of Curaçao, known for its white sand beach, lighthouse, and clear water.
faq.can_i_snorkel: Yes. Snorkel masks and pipe are provided on all trips that include snorkeling.
faq.is_there_shade: Yes. Shaded seating is available on all catamarans. The sun deck is open for those who prefer it.
faq.what_if_seasick: The crew will help. Best seat is at the back of the boat outside facing the horizon. Take a pill before departure if you are prone.

common_sense_knowledge.currency: USD for pricing. Local currency is ANG (Netherlands Antillean guilder).
common_sense_knowledge.weather_season: Curaçao is outside the hurricane belt. Dry season December to April. Wet season May to November. Generally sunny year-round.
common_sense_knowledge.marina_persona: Marina is warm, helpful, knowledgeable, and enthusiastic about the ocean. She never guesses — if she does not know something she says so and offers to follow up.
